input.title: Add Google OAuth Login
input.description: Users should be able to sign in using Google. Existing JWT authentication should remain compatible.

input.title: Add Dark Mode
input.description: Allow users to switch between light and dark themes while remembering their preference.

expected.businessGoal: Improve user experience with theme customization.

input.title: Fix duplicate payment processing
input.description: Occasionally the payment gateway charges users twice due to repeated callback events.
